element.hint: Corner radius of day cells in pixels
element.label: Cell Corner Radius
element.name: cell_radius

element.hint: Color representing days with the highest activity
element.label: Color Scale Max
element.name: color_scale_max

element.hint: Extra spacing between months in pixels
element.label: Month Gap (px)
element.name: month_gap

element.hint: Spacing between day cells in pixels
element.label: Cell Gap (px)
element.name: cell_gap

element.hint: Color representing days with the lowest activity
element.label: Color Scale Min
element.name: color_scale_min

element.hint: Size of each day cell in pixels (square)
element.label: Cell Size (px)
element.name: cell_size

element.hint: Display abbreviated month names above each month block
element.label: Show Month Labels
element.name: show_month_labels

element.hint: Display day-of-week labels on the left side
element.label: Show Day Labels
element.name: show_day_labels
